content:
Your **exploration laboratory and staging area** - fully mapped:

### **🧠 AI, Machine Learning & Autonomous Agents (10 repos)**

1. **js-genai** – Google Gemini/Vertex AI SDK
2. **terminal-ai** – Shell-based AI, multi-model support
3. **aionui** – Gemini CLI GUI application
4. **maxmsp_ai** – Deep learning in MaxMSP
5. **DeepCode** – Open Agentic Coding (Paper2Code, Text2Web)
6. **Intelligent-Agent-for-Microsoft-365-Automation** – M365 AI automation
7. **anthropic-cookbook** – Claude implementation recipes
8. **xai-cookbook** – Grok API examples
9. **awesome-ai-agents** – Curated autonomous agents list
10. **stable-diffusion** – Text-to-image diffusion model

**Purpose:** Study AI/ML implementations, test agent frameworks, explore generative models

---

### **📚 Cookbooks, Learning & Documentation (7 repos)**

11. **openai-cookbook** – OpenAI API guides
12. **adaptiveDEVIearningHub** – GitHub Desktop tutorial
